name: Google Workspace Newly Created Privileged Accounts
description: Detects privileged Google Workspace accounts created in the last 7 days for expedited review.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.creation_time AS created_at FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND u.creation_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
remediation: Confirm change tickets and owner approval for newly created privileged accounts.
